title: Icium
description: A modpack focused on completely improving the optimization of vanilla Minecraft.
body:
![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3d0cc432c18096eaf73ae2710b75984dc66893d.png)

## **Introducion Icium!**
Experience smooth gameplay without FPS drops, along with support for connected textures, shaders, and zoom. Turn your Minecraft experience into something fluid, stable, and most importantly, much more enjoyable with Icium!

## **Why Icium?**
The goal of Icium is to maximize Minecraft's performance while keeping the vanilla game unchanged, focusing solely on enhancing optimization to the fullest.

## **High compatibility**
Icium doesn't add any new content to Minecraft, pure optimization mods. Allowing to have full compatibility with any Fabric mod

## **Installation**
On the [discord](https://discord.com/invite/GDFZtA5ekj) you have a complete guide on how to install Icium

## **Bugs or issues?**
If you encounter any bug or issue with Icium, join the [discord](https://discord.com/invite/GDFZtA5ekj) to get support

## **Additional Notes**
Feel free to use Icium as a base for your own modpacks.
